Chelsea star N’Golo Kante will consider a move to Paris Saint-Germain this summer, according to reports. The Frenchman signed a new deal at Stamford Bridge in 2018 but the club have since been hit with a two-window transfer ban and are set to lose star man Eden Hazard.

Paris Saint-Germain have twice shown interest in Kante in the past but the Frenchman’s been content with life in England. However, after failing with a move for Everton midfielder Idrissa Gueye in January, the Ligue 1 giants are set to test Chelsea’s resolve to keep Kante once again.

PSG are willing to better Kante’s wages and the Mirror claim the offer is likely to be ‘too big to ignore’. Chelsea value Kante at around £90m and can ill-afford to lose him given Ruben Loftus-Cheek is set to miss the next 12 months with an Achilles injury.

Maurizio Sarri is sweating on Kante’s fitness for the Europa League final in Baku later this month. The midfielder missed Chelsea’s last two matches of the Premier League season with a hamstring injury. The 28-year-old was left in London as the Blues played a friendly match in Boston, Massachusetts in the week in order for him to step up his recovery with the club’s physios.
https://metro.co.uk/2019/05/19/ngolo-kante-tempted-paris-saint-germain-transfer-french-giants-prepare-bid-9598758/

【Now Sports-體育】意大利傳媒《Calciomercato》爆料，施丹有機會閃電離開皇家馬德里，執教祖雲達斯。

報道指，祖雲達斯雖然日前才宣佈今季後跟教練柯歷利「分手」，但管理層早就作出了這個決定，更有意以施丹（Zinedine Zidane）入主，只是該法國球王選擇在3月重返皇家馬德里。

不過，由於施丹最近疑似跟皇馬會長佩雷斯在球員轉會上意見不合，令前者非常不滿，他曾公開表示：「若我不能夠依照自己意思去管理球隊，我將會離開。」

正是這番說話，令祖記會長艾尼利認為，他們仍然有機會搶得施丹回來執起教鞭，因此遲遲未落實由哪位教練入主。傳聞之中，迪甘斯、施蒙尼恩沙基、干地都是下任祖記主帥的熱門人選。
